title: JMRussas/mcp-rag
summary: Turn any codebase into a searchable knowledge base for AI coding assistants. Config-driven RAG pipeline + MCP server with hybrid semantic/keyword search.

title: Gakuseei/Aria
summary: 🌹 100% offline Chatbot. Custom characters, 13 languages, passion system. Powered by Ollama.

title: crmne/ruby_llm
summary: One beautiful Ruby API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, VertexAI, Perplexity, Mistral, xAI, GPUStack & OpenAI compatible APIs. Agents, Chat, Vision, Audio, PDF, Images, Embeddings, Tools, Streaming & Rails integration.

title: BADMAN4LIFE/LocalAgent
summary: Build and run local-first agents with customizable MCP tools, safe defaults, and replayable workflows for developers at any skill level.

title: wesleyscholl/squish
summary: 🤖🗜️⚡️ Compress local LLMs once, run them forever at sub-second load times. OpenAI + Ollama drop-in for Apple Silicon — statistically identical accuracy, 54× faster cold starts.

title: DavidPacasCDB/transcribe-meetings
summary: InsightLens transforms business meetings into actionable, searchable knowledge. It ingests meeting recordings, slides, and chat logs, then uses advanced AI to transcribe.

title: Lakatos179/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: gabrimatic/eyra
summary: Real-time AI screen analysis from the terminal. Local inference, voice interaction, adaptive model routing.

title: nwtgck/naidan
summary: A privacy-focused web UI for LLMs (OpenAI-compatible APIs and Ollama) designed to run directly from a portable directory on your filesystem.

title: terminus-labs-ai/sr2
summary: Context engineering for AI Agents. Manage your LLM's context window with caching, compaction, summarization, and graceful degradation.

title: devoxx/DevoxxGenieIDEAPlugin
summary: DevoxxGenie is a plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that uses local LLM's (Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Jan and Llama.cpp) and Cloud based LLMs to help review, test, explain your project code. Latest version now also supports Spec Driven Development with CLI Runners.

title: sir-ad/knight
summary: Privacy-first Chrome extension for local resume parsing, ATS autofill, Gmail tracking, and Ollama follow-ups

title: strands-agents/docs
summary: Documentation for the Strands Agents SDK. A model-driven approach to building AI agents in just a few lines of code.
